recentTweets.text:
From the President all the way to the teleprompter operator, everyone in the White House is getting in on the grift. 

This is the most corrupt administration in American history.

I'm voting YES on the Massie amendment.

I won't support sending another blank check to fund the genocide in Gaza and a military campaign in Lebanon that has killed thousands.

Enough is enough.

The CFPB now says lenders should count immigration status against your ability to repay a loan. 

It's racist, it's insulting, and it's outrageous. https://t.co/VfHvSBjAuS

The horrific threats against the Sunnyside Muslim Center, which is located right next door to my Queens district office, are part of a growing wave of Islamophobia targeting mosques and Muslims across the country. 

Muslim New Yorkers are integral parts of our community, and

Relieved that the suspect in last night's attacks on two houses of worship in Queens is in custody. Religious violence has no place in our city.

Grateful to the NYPD and FDNY for their swift response, and thankful no one was hurt.

Lorenzo Salgado Araujo spent 35 years building his life in America. He was a father of three with no criminal record. ICE shot and killed him. 

His family deserves answers. We need a full, independent investigation, and those responsible must be held accountable.

Years of community organizing became reality today as we broke ground on Bartlett Crossing. 

This project will bring 78 affordable homes to Broadway Triangle, part of 390 total coming to North Brooklyn.

This is what happens when communities organize and government listens. https://t.co/gSJDFgvckg

Wishing everyone in NY-7 a safe and happy Fourth of July! 

As America marks 250 years of independence, we celebrate our country and recommit to the ongoing work of building a more perfect union for all.

The extreme heat coming to NYC is a public health emergency.

If you or a loved one doesn't have AC, find a cooling center near you.

Check on elderly neighbors and people with health conditions. Stay hydrated and stay safe.

More than 40,000 New Yorkers and 350,000 people nationwide are now at risk of deportation because this far-right Supreme Court is abandoning the law and basic decency. 

TPS holders belong here. Congress must pass the Dream and Promise Act and create a pathway to citizenship.

The images out of Venezuela are devastating. My heart is with every family impacted, and with the rescue workers trying desperately to save lives. 

The US must lead a swift international relief and recovery effort that meets the urgency of this moment.

This is devestating. This church has been a beacon of hope and service for so many families in Bushwick since 1853. 

We are with the congregation as they begin to rebuild, and thankful no lives were lost.

Beto Coral’s arrest is the latest example of the Trump admin weaponizing immigration enforcement to punish free speech & silence criticism of US foreign policy.

Mr. Coral has committed no crime. This is political persecution and a chilling abuse of power. He must be released.

161 years ago on June 19, 1865, Union troops reached Galveston to enforce the end of slavery, more than two years after the Emancipation Proclamation. 

This Juneteenth, we honor that freedom and recommit to the fight for justice, equality, and liberation.
RT @ReynosoBrooklyn: 🐐🐐🐐 @AlvaradoJose15 @ReElectNydia & Toñita https://t.co/33JiFDJnHh
RT @HispanicCaucus: CHC Chair Espaillat and Rep. Nydia Velazquez demand investment in Puerto Rico amid power and water outages https://t.co…

Colombia's election is for Colombians to decide. Trump's endorsement of Abelardo de la Espriella is brazen interference in another nation's democracy. 

I joined my colleagues in demanding our government respect Colombia's sovereignty.
https://t.co/ElaRBdi09S

Great celebrating the life and legacy of Barbara Ann Smith in Bushwick this weekend. 

Thanks to @CMSandyNurse for organizing this tribute & to the Smith family for sharing her memory. 

This street co-naming will ensure her legacy is forever part of the neighborhood she loved. https://t.co/N4ik296noB

14 yrs ago, DACA gave young people who know nowhere else as home the chance to work, study, & live without fear of deportation.

Dreamers have held up their end. But the Trump admin keeps trying to rip protections away. 

Congress must deliver a permanent pathway to citizenship.

ARFID is a serious eating disorder that often emerges in early childhood, yet it remains widely unrecognized and undertreated. 

Proud to introduce a resolution with @RepPaulTonko supporting the advancement of awareness, early screening, and equitable access to care. https://t.co/tmmvznwGoB

Congrats to @AlvaradoJose15 and the Knicks on their incredible Game 4 performance! 

This son of Williamsburg and proud Puerto Rican is truly living every New Yorker's dream. 

Knicks in 5!

https://t.co/NrAKb57pgb

When disaster strikes, the victims are not Republicans or Democrats. They are Americans.

Nine years after Maria, Puerto Rico still isn't ready to face even a Category 1 hurricane. Shame on us.

Until my last day here, I will be fighting to do right by the people. https://t.co/tfBqzxUY8C

Howard Jordán spent his life lifting up Puerto Rican and Latino voices, from the classroom to the airwaves at WBAI to the streets of NYC. 

He was a fighter for our community until the very end. My condolences to his family and all who loved him.

A year ago, Republicans gutted health care and food assistance to fund tax cuts for billionaires and unleash ICE on our communities.

Today they doubled down, sending $70 billion more for immigration enforcement that's already out of control. I voted NO. https://t.co/6cXcZpsNVM
https://t.co/5AHrfzYeMV

With more than 200 combat missions and 38 decorations, Jorge Otero-Barreto was one of the most decorated soldiers of the Vietnam War.

He is a Puerto Rican and American hero. Our nation owes him a great debt. It's long past time he received the Congressional Medal of Honor. 

I https://t.co/CHjUVPibEV

The NY delegation (and @RepRobinKelly) brought the orange and blue to Capitol Hill this afternoon.

Knicks in four!🧡💙 https://t.co/5R9MRsb8I7

Gender-affirming care is protected under NY law, and no hospital—including @MountSinaiNYC—should be handing over children's medical records to this administration. 

NYC hospitals must protect the privacy of trans youth and their families. Any hospital that caves is selling out

In 2025, the GOP handed ICE & CBP $170 billion. They used it to terrorize immigrant communities, trample the constitution, & kill US citizens in the streets.

Now the Senate voted to give them ANOTHER $70B while working people struggle to get by.

The House must kill this bill.
RT @commondreams: “This administration is rushing toward another disastrous war, putting countless American and foreign lives at risk," say…

I have been inside Delaney Hall, where immigrants from our communities are being torn from their families and held in appalling conditions. 

They deserve humane treatment, due process, and accountability. Delaney Hall must be shut down.
https://t.co/K9fo7qxEkM

Trump is marching us toward another unauthorized war, this time in Cuba.

Congress must reassert its constitutional authority if the President continues on this illegal path.

Today, @RepGregoryMeeks & I introduced a War Powers Resolution to stop this conflict. No war with Cuba. https://t.co/GUyTmBnNb1

Eid Mubarak to the Muslim community in Brooklyn, Queens, and around the world celebrating Eid al-Adha today.

Wishing you a day filled with peace, joy, and time with loved ones.

A Brooklyn mother is grieving her 14-year-old son tonight. 

Subway surfing took Akhi Butler's life far too early, like it has too many young people in NYC. 

We need to come together as a city to put an end to this dangerous practice for good.

Today, Republicans canceled a vote to stop Trump's war with Iran because they knew they were going to lose.

Costs are skyrocketing, but they won't lift a finger to help working families. Instead, they're rubberstamping Trump's march into another forever war.

Ismael Guadalupe Ortiz dedicó su vida a Vieques. Desde enfrentar a la Marina siendo adolescente hasta encabezar la campaña de desobediencia civil que puso fin a los bombardeos en 2003, nunca dejó de luchar.
Puerto Rico ha perdido a un gran patriota. 

Mi corazón está con todos

The murder of Eryka Caldwell in Bushwick is heartbreaking. Intimate partner violence claims the lives of trans women at staggering rates. Eryka should still be here today. 

Sending my thoughts to her family, her friends, and the community mourning her.

Today, the House passed the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, a meaningful step toward addressing our housing affordability crisis.

I secured provisions to open federal housing programs to cooperatives and strengthen Congressional oversight of NYCHA's federal monitor.

The https://t.co/iwxgfnMAHr

Mourning the loss of Barney Frank. On the Financial Services Committee, he took on Wall Street and delivered real protections for working families.

As one of the first openly gay members of Congress, he opened doors for so many others. My condolences to his loved ones.

The Trump Justice Department just created a $1.8 billion slush fund that could funnel taxpayer money to Trump loyalists, even Jan. 6 rioters.

It’s corrupt, outrageous, and a direct assault on the rule of law.

Americans deserve a Justice Department that serves the public, not a

Trump promised no new wars. Now he's marching us toward another unauthorized war, just like Venezuela and Iran.

Congress must pass a war powers resolution. No war with Cuba.

Americans bringing humanitarian aid to Gaza have been abducted. 

The State Department must act to protect all captives. They must be kept safe, released immediately, and the aid must be allowed to reach those in desperate need. 

The inhumane blockade of Gaza must end.

Had a great time celebrating the 21st Annual Graham Avenue Fiesta. 

Great music, great food, and the small businesses that make the Avenue of Puerto Rico one of Brooklyn's best stretches! https://t.co/kKRNXGGDCC

UPR is too important to Puerto Rico’s future to be dismantled by austerity.

This week, alongside my colleagues, I urged the Fiscal Oversight Board to reject harmful cuts, protect pensions, cap tuition costs, and invest in public higher education.

The UPR it is a pillar of https://t.co/FZthnuRLMi

George Gresham was a good friend. 

For decades, he fought for healthcare workers, for immigrants, and for the dignity of working people. 

New York’s working families lost a giant. My thoughts are with his loved ones and the entire 1199 family.

Yesterday, I joined the students of P.S. 116 in Bushwick for a special podcast conversation.
 
We talked about leadership, public service, and the importance of making your voice heard.
 
So great to talk to the next generation of leaders! https://t.co/qOsp2ZnCfS

Every family deserves reliable https://t.co/PpJ89MSJCW

Heartbroken by the tragic loss of a 9-year-old child struck by a school bus this morning in Williamsburg, Brooklyn. 

My prayers are with the child’s family and loved ones during this unimaginable time. 

We must do more to protect our children and ensure safe streets in every

Today's SCOTUS decision is a direct attack on our democracy.

By undermining critical voting protections, this ruling opens the door to discrimination and silences voices, especially in communities of color.

We should be strengthening the right to vote, not stripping it away.

Disturbed by tonight's shooting at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. 

Thank you to the law enforcement officers whose quick action kept attendees safe. 

Relieved to hear the officer who was shot is expected to be okay. Political violence has no place in our country.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 2 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Nydia M. Velázquez. The social-media posture reads as humanitarian / minority-protection signal because the strongest matched frame is humanitarian or minority-protection language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around humanitarian or minority-protection language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 1 humanitarian/minority hit, and 2 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-04-10T15:08:21Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
